content.full_text:
May 6, 2004

Charlene Cruz
County of Los Angeles
Campaign Finance Disclosure Section
Registrar-Recorder/County Clerk
12400 Imperial Highway
Norwalk, CA 90650

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-091

Dear Ms. Cruz:

This letter is to notify you that, at your request, we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Adrianne Korchmaros
Political Reform Consultant
